items.caption: A happy meal box designed to resemble a kiss album cover, complete with the band's iconic makeup and the band's name prominently displayed. the box is styled to mimic a mcdonald's happy meal container, complete with a red "m" logo and the "happy meal" text. in the background, there is a small figurine of a kiss band member, holding a guitar, and a sticker with the band's name and the text "happy meal." the overall style of the image is a playful and humorous take on the popular fast-food brand's packaging, incorporating elements of rock music culture.
